name: LinkedIn
description: Read LinkedIn profiles, search people and companies, and post content to LinkedIn via the unofficial LinkedIn MCP server. Useful for professional research, outreach drafting, and publishing thought leadership content.

tools_summary.name: linkedin_get_profile
tools_summary.description: Get the authenticated user's LinkedIn profile

setup_instructions: Obtain a LinkedIn OAuth access token via the LinkedIn API Developer Portal. Requires a LinkedIn app with r_liteprofile, r_emailaddress, w_member_social scopes. Set as LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN.
_note: LinkedIn's official API is restricted. For personal use, some community MCP servers use browser-based auth. Verify the npm package is available and matches your use case.
